name: Mocha Zucchini Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Instant Coffee, dissolved in 1/4 cup hot water
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Thoroughly grease a glass loaf pan.
3. Sift dry ingredients together.
4. In the bowl of an electric mixer, cream shortening and sugar together until light and fluffy.
5. Add eggs to the creamed mixture one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
6. Add dissolved instant coffee to the mixture and mix for another minute.
7. Gently fold in grated zucchini using a spatula or wooden spoon, just until combined.
8. Mix in the dry ingredients by hand, stirring until just incorporated.
9. Pour batter into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
10. Bake for 50-60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
11. Let cool in the pan on a cooling rack for 15-20 minutes before turning out onto a wire rack to finish cooling.
12. Serve slightly warm with butter, cream cheese, or plain spread.
